name: Do-Hyeong Lee
education: M.S.-Ph.D. Candidate, School of EE, Yonsei University (2026.09 ~ Present)
B.S., Department of Electrical Engineering, Hanyang University, Ansan, Korea (2020.03 ~ 2026.02)
publication: D.-H. Lee, D.-H. Heo, S.-H. Ok, S.-H. Gong, and Min-Seong Choo, Low-Complexity Referenceless Clock and Data Recovery with a Novel Alexander Phase-Frequency Detector, IDEC Journal of Integrated Circuits and Systems (JICAS), 12(2), 40-46. [Paper]
biography: Do-Hyeong Lee received a B.S. degree in the school of electrical engineering at Hanyang University, Ansan, South Korea. He is currently pursuing a Ph.D. integrated degree in the department of intelligent display engineering at Yonsei University, Seoul, South Korea. His research interests include analog and digital circuit designs of clock and data recovery (CDR).
